nasb.text: Therefore it says, “When He ascended on high, He led captive a host of captives, And He gave gifts to men.”

esv.text: Therefore it says, “When he ascended on high he led a host of captives, and he gave gifts to men.”

cnv.text: 所以他說： “他升上高天的時候， 擄了許多俘虜， 把賞賜給了人。”

ccb.text: 因此圣经上说： “祂升上高天时， 带着许多俘虏， 将恩赐赏给众人。”

csbs.text: 所以经上说： 他升上高天的时候，掳掠了俘虏， 把各样的恩惠赐给了人。
